description: ExpB SettingA1 implicit-transitive relation decoding. A linear probe is trained on Step5 hidden-state features to predict the implicit spatial relation label between probe_subject and probe_object. The main feature is hidden(probe_subject) - hidden(probe_object). Evaluation uses a scene split and optionally reports results by implicit_rule.

direction_filter_info.reason: Current Step6 uses Step4T implicit-transitive samples. There is no direct/inverse train-test direction protocol here.
